textByHash.439ab061e3174cb0526adf3380c63391acf8a624: Hush - I'm trying to perfect the art of dealing off the bottom of the deck.
textByHash.c182c498f75d6c920a3db470ef6ad4775b4a9aa5: Tssch... that chemist asks for a lot for the wages he pays.
textByHash.94f6d5ccd30af524df20324699bea5e6ee578ed9: Nah... I just use my initiative here and there.
textByHash.7ac9a23ea6ee496cb20d569ede3bdd67b8f5b562: Right. I'll meet you at the Dancing Donkey Inn in south east Varrock. Be lucky!
textByHash.57f1fd11b6768cb0cadd61f7a9dadce0d819bf50: Look, I've got your vial but I'm not taking two. I always like to play the percentages.
textByHash.b104279a82dba811d339464ba566bac194cf37f5: Leave me alone. I'm trying to find my gambling buddies!
textByHash.d92d1fd25b3c73627c9aa5b5939e478f8ad72ac1: No problem. I've got some money for you actually.
textByHash.84f04ab65723dced1151d601c9592c8cdbca0f62: Well, it turns out that potion you gave me, was quite valuable...
textByHash.2b123461a9598fd5393b32a063330155062fe3a8: I know that I probably shouldn't have sold it... but some friends and I were having a little wager, the odds were just too good!
textByHash.ce41849855df2806cfdbff2c0265efff74ea962c: Actually yes... but praise be to Saradoming because I won! So all's well that ends well right?
textByHash.d5b3b73c4bdad755735254447b4ef8b15faffb10: Well, there's no pleasing some people. Here's your cut anyway.
textByHash.74192f57e24a277e818a85ef854814616aea5202: Ignorance is bliss I'm afraid. Here's your cut anyway.
textByHash.8350da7ef8431222f1afc615f6afa649b7b4939d: Next time give me something more valuable... I couldn't get anything for this on the blackmarket.
textByHash.f8a4e9caf0e1661e95bcbdcf2cd368f157f91a98: Hush - I'm trying to perfect the art of dealing off the bottom of the deck. Whatever you want, come back later and I'll speak to you then.
textByHash.4534d2de240c1c7b497da367727185f2ecc2c636: Leave me alone. I'm trying to find my gambling buddies! Whatever you want, come back later and I'll speak to you then.
